query:
SELECT
                ct.id AS contact_id,
                co.id AS company_id,
                co.email_sync AS "email_sync!"
            FROM crm_contacts ct
            JOIN crm_companies co ON co.id = ct.company_id
            JOIN crm_domains d ON d.company_id = co.id
            WHERE co.team_id = $1
              AND LOWER(ct.email) = $2
              AND LOWER(d.domain) = $3
            LIMIT 1
